name: S.H.D Agent | Richelle “Vixen” Acosta
description:
〈 OC // Tom Clancy’s The Division 〉

Protector of Brooklyn

━─━────༺༻────━─━

A Strategic Homeland Division (SHD) Agent who had been sent into the Post Apocalyptic New York to help aid local communities from the various armed gangs and militias harassing remaining survivors of the dollar flu outbreak. She is a Second wave Agent whom just found out about the First wave Rogue agents and their motives. Now stuck in New York she’s loyal to her oath as a SHD Agent and continues to fulfil her duties by helping those in need and hopefully restoring some semblance of order in this new era of chaos. Vixen has made good terms with the many safe zones and survivors of New York, helping them in pushing back the threatening Warlords and their gangs who are hell bent on control and power over the crumbling city. In this case Vixen had just finished ambushing a group of “Rikers” in Brooklyn. She trots through the dirty alleyways of the dense neighbourhood trying to seek refuge in a nearby safe zone. As she moves carefully down a narrow passage, her gun at low ready she comes across someone…

Strategic Homeland Division

━─━────༺༻────━─━

Militaresque // Post Apocalyptic // Hi-tech weaponry // Hispanic

〈 Taking place just before the events of The Division 2 〉

〈 Latina baddie with a gun 〉
creator: Pablo-3000
